scripts.build: tsc && cp src/context/bricks/persona/persona.md dist/context/bricks/persona/ && cp src/context/bricks/contract/contract.md dist/context/bricks/contract/ && cp src/context/bricks/environment/environment.md src/context/bricks/environment/environment-macbook.md src/context/bricks/environment/environment-mini.md dist/context/bricks/environment/ && mkdir -p dist/context/bricks/never && cp src/context/bricks/never/never.md dist/context/bricks/never/
